vocab.meaning: địa hình nhấp nhô, gợn sóng
vocab.example: I fancy a long trek across the undulating terrain of the Scottish Highlands to test my physical endurance.
Walking along a coastal trail would allow me to breathe in the salty air while listening to the rhythmic crashing of waves.

vocab.meaning: sự tĩnh lặng/cô độc yên bình
vocab.example: I often crave the tranquil solitude that only a deep forest path can provide after a chaotic week.
A stroll through Rome would be ideal, as you encounter stunning architectural marvels at every single turn.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác thoát ly thực tế
vocab.example: Taking a long walk through a sprawling botanical garden offers a much-needed sense of escapism from urban life.

vocab.meaning: phong cảnh xanh tươi, mướt mắt
vocab.example: I've always dreamed of wandering through the verdant landscapes of New Zealand's North Island.

vocab.meaning: làm hồi sinh/tiếp thêm năng lượng cho tâm hồn
vocab.example: There is something about the crisp morning air in the mountains that truly helps to reinvigorate the soul.

vocab.meaning: đi lang thang/đi dạo quanh co qua...
vocab.example: I would love to spend an entire afternoon meandering through the hidden backstreets of Kyoto.

vocab.meaning: những khám phá tình cờ đầy thú vị
vocab.example: Long walks are perfect for making serendipitous discoveries, like finding a charming little bookstore tucked away in an alley.

vocab.meaning: một cuộc hành hương tâm linh
vocab.example: If I had the chance, I would walk the Camino de Santiago, treating it as a spiritual pilgrimage to find inner peace.
